source_actor: European High Performance Computing Joint Undertaking (EuroHPC JU)
target_actor: Grand Equipement National de Calcul Intensif (GENCI)
interaction_phrase: hosted by GENCI
occurrence_sentence: The system will be hosted by GENCI (Grand Equipement National de Calcul Intensif, France), installed and operated at TGCC (Très Grand Centre de calcul du CEA (Commissariat à l'énergie atomique et aux énergies alternatives, France)), one of the three national computing centres operated by CEA in France.

interaction_phrase: tightly integrating two quantum computers, each controlling 100-plus qubits in the Tier-0 HPC systems Joliot-Curie of GENCI
occurrence_sentence: HPCQS is the first initiative towards a federated European quantum computing infrastructure, tightly integrating two quantum computers, each controlling 100-plus qubits in the Tier-0 HPC systems Joliot-Curie of GENCI and the JUWELS modular supercomputer at the Julich Supercomputing Centre (JSC).
